steps.title: Identify what 'registered' describes
steps.content: The motorman is frustrated (chafed), thinking about the laborer's difficult lot. He then registered discontent—this phrase must describe how his internal frustration becomes visible or apparent to an observer.

steps.title: Match the correct word to the target meaning
steps.content:
The target meaning is to display or to show. Discontent is shown through behavior or facial expression, and displayed directly captures this sense of making something visible or evident. The other three don't describe how emotions are expressed externally.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
